name: Compania Pesquera Camanchaca S.A.
summary: Compa√É¬±√É¬≠a Pesquera Camanchaca S.A. engages in the industrial fishing business in Chile, the United States, Mexico, Japan, Europe, and China. The company produces fishmeal, frozen and canned jack mackerel, langostino lobster, and fish oil in northern and southern Chile; and is involved in the salmon farming activities. It also engages in farming mussels, abalones, and shellfish, as well as logistics services. In addition, the company export fishes and shellfish to approximately 50 countries. Compa√É¬±√É¬≠a Pesquera Camanchaca S.A. was founded in 1965 and is based in Santiago, Chile.
